criteria.name: Characterization Tests First
criteria.description: The agent must write RSpec tests for the existing controller behavior BEFORE altering the controller's logic.

criteria.name: Test Coverage
criteria.description: The tests must cover both the happy path (successful order creation) and the failure path (e.g., inventory failure).

criteria.name: Extraction and Delegation
criteria.description: The core business logic must be moved from the controller into a distinct Service Object, leaving a skinny controller that primarily handles HTTP concerns and delegates to the service.

criteria.name: Behavior Preservation
criteria.description: The underlying business logic, responses, and HTTP status codes must remain identical to the original implementation.

criteria.name: Single Responsibility Principle (SRP)
criteria.description: The newly extracted Service Object must adhere to the Single Responsibility Principle.

criteria.name: YARD Documentation
criteria.description: The extracted public methods in the new Service Object must be documented using correct YARD tags.
